---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for gm2tiled
title: 'feat: [Brief description]'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### 🔗 Background

Is this feature request related to a missing conversion feature, a specific
game, or a usability issue? Briefly describe the motivation.

---

### 💡 Feature Description

Describe the feature in detail:
- What should it do?
- Example CLI usage or expected output
- Which games or room types would benefit?

---

### ⚖ Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why they don't work as well?

---

### 📝 Additional Information

Any extra context, links to GameMaker documentation, Tiled format specs,
or code snippets that would help.
